prompt: Find me everything in my wiki that's connected to transformer architecture. I want both the conceptual atoms and the specific papers/articles I've saved.

assertions.name: relationship-chains-followed
assertions.description: Response mentions following specific relationship fields (extends::, uses::, part-of::, cites::) not just filename matching

assertions.name: sources-table-present
assertions.description: Response includes a table or list of sources with URL and status columns

assertions.name: adjacent-concepts-listed
assertions.description: Response surfaces at least one adjacent concept to explore, with the relationship type named

assertions.name: no-hallucinated-files
assertions.description: Any [[note links]] cited correspond to files that actually exist in the vault
